news.t: U.S. Natural Gas Futures Extend Decline
BMO Announces Upcoming Reverse Splits of Six Series of its Exchange Traded Notes (NYSE Arca: BERZ, BNKD, DULL, FLYD, NRGD and OILD)
BMO and REX Shares Launch U.S. Big Banks and U.S. Big Oil Leveraged & Inverse Leveraged Exchange Traded Notes on NYSE Arca

holdings.infoBox: NRGD is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings. The top holdings are Marathon Petroleum stock at 10.63%, Valero Energy at 10.62%, Phillips 66 at 10.51%, Chevron at 10.13%, and EOG Resources at 9.98%.

overview.description: The MicroSectors U.S. Big Oil - 3 Inverse Leveraged ETN (NRGD) is an exchange-traded note that is based on the Solactive MicroSectors U.S. Big Oil index. The fund aims to provide 300% inverse exposure to the daily price performance of an equal-weighted index of US Oil & Gas companies. Index components are selected by free-float market-cap. NRGD was launched on Feb 19, 2025 and is issued by REX Microsectors.
infoTable: Solactive MicroSectors U.S. Big Oil Index

data.title: U.S. Natural Gas Futures Extend Decline
data.text: U.S. natural gas futures fell, with oil markets continuing to sell off on peace deal hopes and domestic weather-driven demand seen light for the next couple of weeks.
